calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant?S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1-PLAINTIFF ALI DASTGHEIB's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant?S Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents.

Plaintiff Ali Sina Dastgheib's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Defendant's Person Most Knowledgeable And Production Of Documents is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

Defendant must produce its PMK by June 15, 2026.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2- PLAINTIFF ALI DASTGHEIB AN INDIVIDUAL's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

Plaintiff Ali Sina Dastgheib's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART.

(see word minutes for full details)

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
